title: clematis patens subsp. tientaiensis
intro: Clematis patens subsp. tientaiensis, a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family, is native to China and is also known as Tientai clematis. This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clematis patens subsp. tientaiensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
